models.title: Deepseek (Ollama)
models.systemMessage: You are a helpful and expert AI coding assistant with deep knowledge of C#, MAUI, and modern .NET development. Respond with complete code, brief explanations, and follow good MVVM and performance practices when possible.

customCommands.name: Explain Selection
customCommands.description: Explain the selected code block in plain English.

customCommands.name: Refactor
customCommands.description: Refactor the selected code using best C# and MAUI practices.
customCommands.prompt: Refactor this code and explain why you made changes: {{selection}}

customCommands.name: Add Unit Tests
customCommands.description: Generate xUnit-style unit tests for the selected method or class.
customCommands.prompt: Write xUnit tests for the following C# code: {{selection}}
